name: Moroccan Chicken with Preserved Lemons
recipeInstructions:
1. For less sodium, use ripe olives instead of calamatas.
2. Pour oil into a 10-12 inch frying pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken and turn pieces often to brown on all sides, about 15 minutes. Lift out chicken; set aside.
3. Remove all but 1 tablespoon oil from the pan. Add onion; stir often over medium-high heat until tinged with brown, about 5 minutes. Stir in paprika, ginger, turmeric, and pepper. Add 1 cup water, chicken, olives, 6 preserved lemon quarters, and 1 tablespoon preserved lemon liquid.
4. Cover pan and simmer, turning once, until meat is no longer pink at the bone (cut to test) 20-25 minutes. Skim and discard fat; transfer chicken and sauce to a wide bowl. Garnish chicken with remaining lemon wedges and cilantro.
